title: GATE Previous Year Question Papers with Solutions PDF, PW PYQ ...
content:
## GATE Previous Year Question Papers Subject Wise PDF

The Previous Year GATE Question Paper include 65 multiple-choice questions (MCQs), multiple-select questions (MSQs), and numerical answer type (NAT) questions. Each question is worth 1 or 2 marks.

According to the GATE Exam Pattern, the General Aptitude section accounts for 15% of the total marks, the Engineering Mathematics section covers 13%, and the core subject paper accounts for the remaining 72%.

The GATE question paper for subjects such as CY, AR, DA, EY, GG, MA, PH, XH, ST, and XL, on the other hand, consists of only two sections: general aptitude worth 15 percent and core subject paper worth 85 percent. [...] |  |  |
 --- |
| GATE Exam 2026 Overview | |
| Exam Name | GATE 2026 |
| Organizing Institute | IIT Guwahati |
| Exam Mode | Online |
| Level | National |
| Category | Entrance Exam |
| Exam Duration | 3 hours |
| Total Marks | 100 |
| Number of Questions | 65 |
| Types of Questions |  Multiple-Choice Questions (MCQs)  Multiple-Select Questions  Numerical Answer Type (NAT) Questions |
| Marking Scheme |  1 or 2 marks per question  1/3 negative marking for 1-mark MCQs  2/3 negative marking for 2-mark MCQs |
| Sections |  General Aptitude  Engineering Mathematics  Concerned Discipline |
| GATE Official Website 2026 | gate2026.iitg.ac.in |

## Steps to Download the GATE Previous Years Question Paper PDF [...] Aspirants who wish to download the subject-wise GATE previous year question papers with solutions book PDFfrom the IIT Roorkee's official website can follow the steps outlined below:

Step 1:  Visit the GATE exam conducting authority's official website, i.e., gate.iitr.ac.in.

Step 2:  Look out for the "Download" option available in the middle of the landing page.

Step 3:  To download the GATE previous year's question papers, select the year from 2019 to 2025 as well as the desired subject.

Step 4:  Click on the preferred subject option from the 30 subject lists provided on the screen.

Step 5:  After clicking, the GATE Previous Year Question Paper PDF will be ready to view or download.

## GATE Previous Year Question Papers Subject Wise PDF

title: GATE Previous Year Question Paper with Solution, Download PDF
content:
### 1. Understand the Syllabus and Exam Pattern

The first step in preparing for GATE 2026 is to know the syllabus and the exam structure properly. Each branch has its own subjects, but Engineering Mathematics and General Aptitude are common for all. The exam has multiple-choice questions, numerical answer-type questions, and questions that test your analytical ability.

 Read the complete GATE syllabus of your branch and mark the topics.
 Divide the subjects into strong, medium, and weak areas.
 Note that General Aptitude and Mathematics carry good weightage.
 Use a copy of the syllabus while studying so you do not miss anything.

### 2. Make a Proper Study Plan [...] |  |  |
 --- |
| Section | Important Topics |
| General Aptitude | Quantitative Aptitude, Data Interpretation, Logical Reasoning, English Grammar |
| Engineering Maths | Linear Algebra, Calculus, Differential Equations, Probability, Statistics |
| Core Subjects | Branch-specific areas (e.g., Thermodynamics for ME, Power Systems for EE, DBMS for CSE) |
| Numerical Ability | Numerical Answer Type Questions, Approximation, Unit Conversions |
| Problem Solving | Previous Year Question Trends, Short Tricks, Time Management Practice |

Check Out: GATE & ESE Books

## GATE Previous Year Question Paper with Solution [...] Solve one full GATE previous year question paper in exam conditions.
 Check the solutions and learn the right methods.
 Note repeated topics and focus more on them.
 Use a GATE PYQ book PDF if you want all papers in one place.

### 5. Focus on Scoring Sections

Some parts of the paper are easier to score if you practice them regularly. General Aptitude and Logical Reasoning usually do not need heavy memory but require practice. Similarly, Mathematics is common for all and can give good marks if revised well.

 Practice General Aptitude questions daily.
 Revise Mathematics formulas regularly.
 Use GATE pyq for aptitude and maths to see question trends.
 Do not ignore small scoring topics, as they add to your total.

### 6. Make Notes and Revise Often

The paper had 37 Multiple Choice Questions & 28 Numerical Answer type questions. There were no Multiple Select Questions in the exam.

 In this year, questions were in a jumbled manner (1 mark and 2 mark ), while one mark questions and two mark questions were asked separately the previous year.
 Overall the difficulty level of the paper was medium. [...] ## GATE Previous Year Question Paper​ with Answer Keys - Free PDF Download

The GATE exam administrators have released the GATE 2021 question papers for all 27 subjects/papers on their official website, along with the GATE answer keys. Applicants can download the GATE 2021 question papers PDF by the link provided here. Going through past year's GATE question papers provides insight into the major areas from the GATE Syllabus. You will learn about the types of questions on relevant topics/subtopics, the level of preparation required for this competitive test, and the level of difficulty. The GATE previous year papers will also help applicants understand how to manage their time throughout the exam and improve their ability to handle difficult problems.

|  | [...] ### GATE 2021 CS - Exam Analysis (Session 1)

The session 1 CSE Paper had 34 Multiple Choice Questions,13 Multiple Select Questions and 18 Numerical Answer Type Questions. The difficulty level of the exam was medium.

 The exam was similar to the last year. Most of the questions were concept-based questions.
 There were questions on Dynamic Hashing, for the very first time.
 From the section Quantitative Aptitude, 3 reasoning, and four questions from quantitative. All 10 questions were MCQ type.

title: TCS NQT Aptitude Questions Solved Problems with Detailed ...
content:
#### TCS NQT Aptitude Questions Question 4:

A is 150% of B and B is 40% of C. If A + B + C = 20, then the value of 2B + 3C - 4A is equal to:

1. 15
2. 20
3. 16
4. 14

#### Answer (Detailed Solution Below)

Option 4 : 14

#### TCS NQT Aptitude Questions Question 4 Detailed Solution

Given:

A = 150/100 × B

B = 40/100 × C

Calculation:

⇒ A + B + C = 20

⇒ 3B/2 + B + 5B/2 = 20

⇒ 10B/2 = 20

⇒ B = 4

⇒ A = 6

⇒ C = 10

∴ 2B + 3C - 4A = 2 × 4 + 3 × 10 - 4 × 6 = 14

Alternate MethodStep 1: Convert the percentage into ratios.

A       B        C

3  :    2

         2    :    5

Step 2: Equalize all three ratios.

A       B        C

3   :   2         2

2       2    :    5

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_  
 6   :   4    :   10  
 \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_ [...] 3   :   2    :    5  
 \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

Given, A + B + C = 20

3 + 2 + 5 units --------- 20

10 units -------- 20

1 unit ------2

∴ A = 3 × 2 = 6, B = 2 × 2 = 4, C = 5 × 2 = 10

∴2B + 3C - 4A = 2 × 4 + 3 × 10 - 4 × 6 = 14

query: "tcs" "Averages" "medium" previous year question with solution MCQ numerical PDF OR gateoverflow OR official paper
title: TCS Aptitude Questions: Solved TCS NQT Tests, Download PDF
content:
Question 1: In a class, the average height of boys is 165 cm, and the average height of girls is 155 cm. If the average height of the whole class is 160 cm, what is the ratio of boys to girls in the class?

Let the number of boys be B and the number of girls be G. The total height = B \ 165 + G \ 155. Given total height = (B + G) \ 160. Solve for B/G, the ratio is 3:2.

Question 2: If x + y = 10 and 3x – 2y = 4, find the value of x.

Solve the second equation for x: x = (4 + 2y) / 3. Substitute x in the first equation: (4 + 2y) / 3 + y = 10. Solving for y, we get y = 3. Substituting y in x, we get x = 4.

Question 3: The difference between a number and its two-fifths is 400. Find the number.

Let the number be N. We have N – 2/5 \ N = 400. Solving for N, we get N = 1000. [...] Answer: Let the number be N. We have 0.25N = 75. Solving for N, we get N = 300. Therefore, 50% of N is 0.50 \ 300 = 150.

Question 13: If a shirt is sold for $30 with a 15% profit, what was its cost price?

Answer: Let the cost price be C. Selling price = Cost price + Profit. We have 30 = C + 0.15C. Solving for C, we get C = 26.09.

Question 14: Solve: 5x + 8 = 23.

Answer: Subtract 8 from both sides: 5x = 15. Divide by 5: x = 3.

Question 15: The area of a square is 121 square units. What is the length of its side?

Answer: Side length of square = √Area = √121 = 11 units.

Question 16: If 60% of a number is 120, what is 80% of the same number?

Answer: Let the number be N. We have 0.60N = 120. Solving for N, we get N = 200. Therefore, 80% of N is 0.80 \ 200 = 160. [...] Question 4: A train travels a distance of 360 km in 5 hours. What is its speed?

Speed = Distance / Time. Speed = 360 km / 5 hours = 72 km/h.

Question 5: If 20% of a number is 50, what is 40% of the same number?

Let the number be N. We have 0.20N = 50. Solving for N, we get N = 250. Therefore, 40% of N is 0.40 \ 250 = 100.

Question 6: A shopkeeper sold an article for $450, incurring a loss of 10%. What was the cost price of the article?

Let the cost price be C. Selling price = Cost price – Loss. We have 450 = C – 0.10C. Solving for C, we get C = 500.

Question 7: Simplify: √(64 – 9) + √(25 + 16).

√(64 – 9) + √(25 + 16) = √55 + √41.

Question 8: If 2x – 3 = 7, what is the value of x?

Add 3 to both sides: 2x = 10. Divide by 2: x = 5.

content:
#### Mixture Problems Question 4:

Two vessels A and B contain milk and water in the ratio \( 4 : 3 \) and \( 5 : 3 \) respectively. In what ratio these two mixtures are mixed to get a new mixture which contains \( 60\% \) milk.

#### Answer (Detailed Solution Below)

#### Mixture Problems Question 4 Detailed Solution

Given:

Vessel A: Milk to Water Ratio = 4:3

Vessel B: Milk to Water Ratio = 5:3

New Mixture: Milk = 60% = 60/100 = 3/5

Formula used:

Alligation Rule:

\( \text{Difference between concentration of milk in Vessel B and New Mixture : Difference between concentration of milk in Vessel A and New Mixture} \)

Calculation:

Milk in Vessel A = 4/(4+3) = 4/7

Milk in Vessel B = 5/(5+3) = 5/8

⇒ Difference for Vessel A = |3/5 - 4/7| [...] #### Answer (Detailed Solution Below)

#### Mixture Problems Question 15 Detailed Solution

Given:

The cost price of wine = Rs. 60 per litre

The cost price of water = Rs. 0 per litre

The cost price of mixture = Rs. 40 per litre

Calculations:

Let the quantity of wine and water added in final mixture be x and y respectively.

According to the question:

60 × x + 0y = (x + y) × 40

⇒ 60x  = 40x + 40y

⇒ 60x - 40x = 40y

⇒ 20x = 40y

⇒ x : y = 2 : 1

∴ The ratio in which water and wine should be mixed is 1 : 2.

Alternate Method

Alternate Method

Given:

The cost price of wine = Rs. 60 per litre

The cost price of water = Rs. 0 per litre

The cost price of mixture = Rs. 40 per litre

Concept used:

If two indigents are mixed, then

Calculation:

Using alligation, [...] #### Answer (Detailed Solution Below)

#### Mixture Problems Question 11 Detailed Solution

Given:

The ratio of milk and water in the first vessel = 8 : 7

The ratio of milk and water in the second vessel = 7 : 9

The ratio of water and milk in the resultant mixture = 9 : 8

Calculation:

Let x litre of the first mixture and y litre of the second mixture are mixed.

Quantity of milk in x litre of the first mixture = 8x/15

Quantity of milk in y litre of the second mixture = 7y/16

Total quantity of the resultant mixture = (x + y)

Quantity of milk in (x + y) litre of the resultant mixture = 8(x + y)/17

8x/15 + 7y/16 = 8(x + y)/17

⇒ 8x/15 + 7y/16 = 8x/17 + 8y/17

⇒ 8x/15 – 8x/17 = 8y/17 – 7y/16

⇒ (136x – 120x)/15 × 17 = (128y – 119y)/17 × 16

⇒ 16x/15 = 9y/16

⇒ 256x = 135y

C से C कट जाएगा। रिजल्ट आएगा B - D = कितना मिलेगा यहां पर अपन को? 18 लिख दूं ना। और सर B + D फोर्थ इक्वेशन 116 दी गई है। दोनों को ऐड करेंगे तो D कटेगा। तो 2B आ जाएगा बेटा आपका कितना? बोलो। अ 134 है ना? मतलब B की वैल्यू आ जाएगी 134 / 2 राइट? B की वैल्यू आ जाएगी 134 / 2. सो दैट मस्ट बी इक्वल टू 67। अगर B 67 है तो B + D की वैल्यू 116 है। आपको बताना है B 67 है तो D कितना होगा? सिंपल सा क्वेश्चन। एक बार फिर से चेक कर लेते हैं। B + C, C + D फर्स्ट - सेकंड तो B - D मिलेगा आपको। 130 - 102 व्हिच इज़ इक्वल टू 28। शाबाश। यहां गलती की थी अपन ने जो नहीं करनी चाहिए थी। बहुत बड़ी मिस्टेक है। 28 आएगा। अब b + d जो फोर्थ इक्वेशन है दोनों को ऐड ऑन करते हैं तो d से d कटेगा। मतलब 2b इक्वल टू आ जाएगा 116 + 28 ऐड कर दो। 116 + 20 127 144 144 आ गया तो सर b आ जाएगा 72 b आ जाएगा 72। ठीक है? B 72 है तो 72 + d [...] निकालता हूं 3x - 34 उषा की ऐज का तो ये x - y के बराबर होगा। आर यू गेटिंग माय पॉइंट? 3x - 34 x - y के बराबर हो जाएगा। सॉल्व करते हैं। सॉल्व करते हैं। तो 2x + y = मिल जाएगा 34। सर ये बात समझ में आ गई? आगे बढ़ते हैं। इसका मतलब यह भी है सर कि x - y का जो डिफरेंस है वो 25 - 2y के बराबर होगा। दैट मींस x + y 25 होगा। यह बात भी समझ में आ गई। पहले उषा निशा को कंपेयर किया। फिर निशा आशा को कंपेयर किया। राइट? अब x + y की वैल्यू 25 यहां पुट कर दो। तो यू विल गेट द आंसर। ये लिखा है 2x + y 2x + y को लिखो x + x + y एंड दैट इज इक्वल टू 34 x + y कितना है? 25 तो x की वैल्यू कितनी आ जाएगी? नौ। अगर x की वैल्यू नौ है तो सर y की वैल्यू कितनी आ जाएगी? 16। किसी भी इक्वेशन में पुट कर दो इन दोनों में से किसी में भी। अगर y की वैल्यू 16 है तो उषा की वर्तमान आयु होगी 34 इयर्स। उस समय आयु होगी 34 इयर्स। y की वैल्यू 16 [...] तो 30 यूनिट को करने में A और B को 30 दिन लगते हैं। मतलब पर डे ये लोग कितना करेंगे? 1 यूनिट। 1 यूनिट पर डे। यह बात पक्की है। आगे बढ़ते हैं। A हैविंग वर्क फॉर 16 डेज। A ने 16 दिन काम किया एंड B फिनिशेस द रिमेनिंग वर्क 44 डेज। मतलब 16 दिन A ने काम किया। 44 दिन B ने काम किया। काम कंप्लीट हो गया। कंप्लीट हो गया। मतलब 30 यूनिट बन के तैयार हो गई। ठीक है भाई? 16a + 44b = 30 यूनिट हो गया। इसको मैं लिख लेता हूं 16 कॉमन लेने के बाद। a + b + बचेगा आपका 28b इक्वल टू हो गया 30 यूनिट। समझ आता है? a और b का पर डे का यूनिट था एक। तो 16 दिन में बनाएंगे ये लोग 16 यूनिट + 28b एंड दैट इज इक्वल टू 30 ठीक है सॉल्व कर लो फटाफट व्हाट वी आर गेटिंग a + b का 16 था ना हां तो आपको मिल रहा है 28b = 40 माइनस माइनस करके b का वैल्यू आ जाएगा 1/2 तो b जो है जनाब वो 1/2 यूनिट पर डे बना रहा है। समझ रहे हो? अब बात करते हैं B
